title: build Pulsefeed v0.1: relay + worker + CLI
scaffold + crypto + queue green
body: 25 tests passing across HMAC verify, replay protection, dedupe, queue helpers.

title: receiver boots, smoke test passes
body: Valid POST -> 202 + row. Replay -> 200 deduped. Bad sig -> 401. All paths verified against a live server.

title: worker dispatching end-to-end
body: Worker claims a pending row, calls relay.dispatch(), marks delivered. 43 tests total now.

title: systemd + internal VPN route live
body: Receiver + worker supervised via systemd, /hooks/* routed over the internal VPN. Survived a reboot.

title: Pulsefeed v0.1 complete, 43 tests, deployed
body: Main -> chat round-trip proven. Repo: meridian-loom/pulsefeed@a1b2c3d.
